nasb.text: So it is not the will of your Father who is in heaven that one of these little ones perish.

esv.text: So it is not the will of my  Father who is in heaven that one of these little ones should perish.

cnv.text: 照樣，你們在天上的父是不願意這些小弟兄中有一個失喪的。

ccb.text: 同样，你们的天父也不愿任何一个卑微的人失丧。

csbs.text: 照样，你们在天上的父也不愿意失去这些卑微人中的一个。
